SESSION.NAME: defaultSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnostic session enables the default diagnostic session in the server(s) and does not support any diagnostic application timeout handling provisions (e.g., TesterPresent service is not necessary to keep the session active). A server shall always start the default diagnostic session when powered up. If no other diagnostic session is started, then the default diagnostic session shall be running as long as the server is powered.

SESSION.NAME: programmingSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession enables all diagnostic services required to support the memory programming of a server. Regardless of whether the programmingSession runs in boot software or not, the ECU shall automatically suspend logging of DTCs and suspend transmission of non-diagnostic frames when entering the programmingSession.

SESSION.NAME: extendedDiagnosticSession
SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This diagnosticSession is used to enable timed diagnostic service functionality (e.g., I/O control). The diagnostic functionality in this session shall also include all supported diagnostic functionality supported in the defaultSession.

DATA_FORMAT_IDENTIFIER.NAME: No Compression Method and No Encryption Method

DTC_FAILURE_TYPE.DESCRIPTION: Circuit Short To Battery or Open
Circuit Short To Ground or Open
Alive / Sequence Counter Incorrect / Not Updated

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: Operation cycle counter #2
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: Number of operation cycles since the DTC fault detection counter last reached its maximum value of +127 (since DTC information was last cleared). The operation cycles during which the test was not completed shall be excluded

DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.NAME: DTC Fault Detection Counter
DTC_EXTENDED_DATA_RECORD.DESCRIPTION: The purpose of this counter is to provide a mechanism for filtering the results of a low-level fault detection process so that test results (pass and fail) can be qualified before setting any DTC status bits.

DTC_OPERATION_CYCLES_SUPPORTED.DTC_OPERATION_CYCLE: Testing for faults and logging continuous DTCs shall be allowed in the following vehicle states: Factory, Normal Run, Autostopped, No LV Bus, and Remote Start. Testing for faults and logging continuous DTCs shall not be allowed in the following vehicle states: Ignition Off, Crank, and Warm ReCrank.

Testing for faults and logging continuous DTCs shall be allowed in the following vehicle states: Factory, Normal Run, Autostopped, No LV Bus, and Remote Start. Testing for faults and logging continuous DTCs shall not be allowed in the following vehicle states: Ignition Off, Crank, and Warm ReCrank. Testing for faults and logging continuous DTCs shall be allowed in the following vehicle states: Factory, Normal Run, Autostopped, No LV Bus, and Remote Start. Testing for faults and logging continuous DTCs shall not be allowed in the following vehicle states: Ignition Off, Crank, and Warm ReCrank.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: sensor supply voltage activated. Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start )
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Vref voltage is lower or equal 3.0 V +/- 5% DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.2s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Put all actuators into 2-position mode per their default operation. Use default values for sensors. Retry Strategy: Every new operation cycle If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation. NOTE: If failure still exists the output shall be disabled again.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: All feedback doors will operate in 2-position mode. Temperature sensors will assume default values. Voltage at Diag_VRef is lower or equal 3.0 V +/- 5%, therefore the feedback values for the door motors and all sensor values are not valid.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start )
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Vref voltage is higher or equal 5,7 V +/- 5% DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.2s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Put all actuators into 2-position mode per their default operation. Use default values for sensors. Retry Strategy: Every ignition cycle If fault eliminated re-enable normal operation. NOTE: If failure still exists the output is disabled again.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: All feedback doors will operate in 2-position mode. Temperature sensors will assume default values. Voltage at Diag_VRef higher or equal 5,7V, therefore the feedback values from the door motors and all sensor values are not valid.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Left_HS Pin low. Button has not been recently pressed.Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Heated Seated are actived via Method 2 and the following error condition: Faulure: Low level is read back from the ECU connector pin when the heated seat left output shall be actived. The failure has to be present for more than 5 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable circuit. If one or more HS LED are active, the LEDs shall remain illuminated per normal operation. Retry strategy: Every new operation cycle or hard reset/cold boot. If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Left seat heater relay permanently active.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Left_HS pin high. Button has been pressed. Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Heated Seated are actived via Method 2 and the following error condition: Faulure: High level is read back from the ECU connector pin when the heated seat left output shall be inactived. The failure has to be present for more than 5 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable circuit. If one or more HS LED are active, the LEDs shall remain illuminated per normal operation. Retry strategy: Every new operation cycle or hard reset/cold boot. If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Left seat heater relay permanently inactive.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Left_HS pin low. This failure can be detected regardless of button press state. Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Heated Seated are actived via Method 2 and the following error condition: Faulure: The ECU connector pin is not connected and the heated seat left is requested to be active. The failure has to be present for more than 5 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable circuit. If one or more HS LED are active, the LEDs shall remain illuminated per normal operation. Retry strategy: Every new operation cycle or hard reset/cold boot. If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Left seat heater relay permanently inactive.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Right_HS pin low.Button has not been recently pressed. Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Heated Seated are actived via Method 2 and the following error condition: Faulure: Low level is read back from the ECU connector pin when the heated seat right output shall be actived. The failure has to be present for more than 5 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable circuit. If one or more HS LED are active, the LEDs shall remain illuminated per normal operation. Retry strategy: Every new operation cycle or hard reset/cold boot. If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Right seat heater relay permanently active.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Right_HS pin high. Button has been pressed. Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Heated Seated are actived via Method 2 and the following error condition: Faulure: High level is read back from the ECU connector pin when the heated seat right output shall be inactived. The failure has to be present for more than 5 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable circuit. If one or more HS LED are active, the LEDs shall remain illuminated per normal operation. Retry strategy: Every new operation cycle or hard reset/cold boot. If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Right seat heater relay permanently inactive.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Right_HS pin low. This failure can be detected regardless of button press state. Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Heated Seated are actived via Method 2 and the following error condition: Faulure: The ECU connector pin is not connected and the heated seat right is requested to be active. The failure has to be present for more than 5 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable circuit. If one or more HS LED are active, the LEDs shall remain illuminated per normal operation. Retry strategy: Every new operation cycle or hard reset/cold boot. If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Right seat heater relay permanently inactive.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start )
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Heated Seats are activated via Method 2 and the following error condition: Left Front Seat Heated Sensor's value is below specified range (0 to 40 increments). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 6.4s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable Heated Seat circuit. If one or more HS LED are active, the LEDs shall remain illuminated per normal operation. Retry Strategy: Every new operation cycle or reactivation request via button push. If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong sensor value measured

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start )
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Heated Seats are activated via Method 2 and the following error condition: Left Front Seat Heated Sensor's value is below specified range (4052 to 4095 increments). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 6.4s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable Heated Seat circuit. If one or more HS LED are active, the LEDs shall remain illuminated per normal operation. Retry Strategy: Every new operation cycle or reactivation request via button push. If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable Heated Seat circuit. If one or more HS LED are active, the LEDs shall remain illuminated per normal operation. DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Heated Seats are activated via Method 2 and the following error condition: Right Front Seat Heated Sensor's value is below specified range (4052 to 4095 increments). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 6.4s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable Heated Seat circuit. If one or more HS LED are active, the LEDs shall remain illuminated per normal operation. Retry Strategy: Every new operation cycle or reactivation request via button push. If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong sensor value measured

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ). Left temperature door is in move state. No actuator drive, feedback or Vref faults detected or logged.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set DTC(s) when door is unable to achieve target feedback voltage. Condition A) Set DTC(s) when door is unable to achieve target feedback voltage. for > 1 second+ ACT_XxxxStallTimeout ( 0 seconds).For Condition A) If a stalled condition is detected per above description, and it is Between Plausible Ranges the module shall execute the following strategy: - After detecting a mechanical block the motor do a High brake with a ACT_ModeDrBrakeTimeout = 200ms timeout - The motor shall drive back from the mechanical block for ACT_StallRetryBackOffTimeout = 500ms. - Then the motor do a High brake with a ACT_ModeDrBrakeTimeout = 200ms timeout - The motor has to follow the matlab application request - These steps shall be done 8 times. The DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 20s ((500ms + 2x200ms + 2s) x 8). 200ms high brake time, 23.2s, so around 24s Condition B) A fault will also be detected if the control moves the motor for a maximum amount of time of ACT_XxxxxMaxDriveTimeout (15sec) but is not able to achieve target feedback voltage. (Where Xxxx could be Mode, Blend Door, Recir) Condtion C) If the actuator is at extreme tolerance window at CW beyond the NVM_XxxxActCwEndPtVoltYy + ACT_XxxxPosPrVoltYyZz or it as at CCW beyond the NVM_XxxxActCcwEndPtVoltYy + ACT_XxxxPosPrVoltYyZz, then Actuator command to stop the movement until new target position requested. Mechanical DTC signal shall be set
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Stop attempting to move door. Allow normal door movement, but only allow one attempt to move past the suspected mechanical blockage after moving away from it. See retry intervall when a new attempt can be started. Retry Strategy: Every new operation cycle or change in target position If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation. Redo calibration during ignition off. NOTE: If failure still exists, stop attempting to move door.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: No motor move possible.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Left temp door is in high break state. Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Can only be checked for each of the motor drive lines if the motor diriver tries to move the motor and sets the drive line to ubatt. This depends on the drive direction (clockwise or counter clockwise). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 16s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable circuit. Retry Strategy: Every new operation cycle or on change in target position If fault is eliminated, re-enable mormal operation. NOTE: If faulure still exists the output shall be disabled again. Assembly test: The detection time shall be between 4 seconds(minimum) and 6 seconds(maximum).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Motor move only possible in one direction.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Left temp door is in the low break state. Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Right temp door is in the high break state. Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Can only be checked, if the motor drive lines are powered (motor driver tries to move the motor). The door does not move to its required target position. The motor driver has a Diag Pin that indicates the short condition If error persists during calibration procedure: calibrated feedback values are not plausible, because door does not move. Default values will be used until a calibration succeeds. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 16s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Mitigation Strategy: Disable circuit for the key cycle (after retry strategy). Retry Strategy: If the failure is present for 16s (2s x 8) for debouncing, disable circuit. Retry only on Ignition Cycle or change in target position. Assembly test: The number of cycles for actuator drive circuit DTC logging are reduced to 4 (@1s interval)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Motor move only possible in one direction.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Left temp door is in the low break state. Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Blower fan relay is active. Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Voltage level on the ECU connector pin is low while selected blower is on. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2s.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable Circuit. Recirc shall default to fresh air. PTC (if installed) shall default off. Retry Strategy: Every new operation cycle or on manual change in blower (via control module Off>On or manual blower selection) If fault is eliminated, re-enable circuit. NOTE: If faulure still exists the output shall be disabled again.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Blower relay is permanently inactive.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start )
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Right Panel Air Discharge Temperature Sensor's value is below specified range (0 to 40 increments). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.6s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Mitigation strategy: Move to default value using filter/slewing rules. Default strategy/value is not invoked until next Ignition cycle. Until Ignition is cycled the last valid value is used. Retry strategy: Continue testing per monitoring cycle and if fault eliminated re-enable circuit.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong sensor value measured

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start )

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Mitigation strategy: Move to default value using filter/slewing rules. Default strategy/value is not invoked until next Ignition cycle. Until Ignition is cycled the last valid value is used. Retry strategy: Continue testing per monitoring cycle and if fault eliminated re-enable circuit.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong sensor value measured

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start )
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Right Floor Air Discharge Temperature Sensor's value is below specified range (0 to 40 increments). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.6s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Mitigation strategy: Move to default value using filter/slewing rules. Default strategy/value is not invoked until next Ignition cycle. Until Ignition is cycled the last valid value is used. Retry strategy: Continue testing per monitoring cycle and if fault eliminated re-enable circuit.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong sensor value measured

(vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start )

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Until the next ignition cycle: Use last valid value. After ignition cycle (and failure is still present) use current defrost discharge temperature by using current filter/slewing rates. Retry strategy: Every new operation cycle If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation

Retry strategy: Every new operation cycle If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation

(vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start )

After ignition cycle (and failure is still present) use current defrost discharge temperature by using current filter/slewing rates. Retry strategy: Every new operation cycle If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation

Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start )
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Left Floor Air Discharge Temperature Sensor's value is below specified range (4052 to 4095 increments). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.6s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Until the next ignition cycle: Use last valid value. After ignition cycle (and failure is still present) use current defrost discharge temperature by using current filter/slewing rates. Retry strategy: Every new operation cycle If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong sensor value measured

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: We consider the sensor to be shorted to GND if the feedback A/D value is below the specified range of 0 to 20 increments. This is < ~97mV with a 5V Vref. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.54s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Use last valid value if fault detected but not logged. Once logged, put actuator into 2-position mode move to end nearest target position. Continue testing per monitoring cycle and if fault eliminated, re-enable circuit and clear DTC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong feedback value causes unknown (wrong) position of temp door

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: We consider the sensor to be shorted to BATT or Open if the feedback A/D value is above the specified range of 1020 to 1023 increments. This is > ~4.98V with a 5V Vref. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.54s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Mitigation Strategy: Use last valid value when a fault is detected but before failure is confirmed. Once failure confirmed, put actuator into 2-position mode moving to end nearest target position. Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid feedback values per monitoring cycle and if fault is eliminated, use value to position the door correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong feedback value causes unknown (wrong) position of temp door

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: At least one button is stuck. This inculdes also the external buttons for Start/Stop and Eco Mode (Vehicle Drive Mode). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 120s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Refer to stuck button strategy. Retry Strategy: Refer to Stuck button strategy.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: one stuck button -> multiple button press faulty more stuck buttons -> evaluation of button press faulty

DTC_FAILURE_INFO.ECU_CONNECTOR_PIN: n/a - keymatrix / all I/Os connected to buttons

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Duty cycle of PWM for front blower motor > 0%. Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Blower is on and voltage level on the ECU connector pin is permanently at high level. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 1s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable circuit. Recirc shall default to fresh air PTC (if installed) shall default to off. Retry Strategy: Every new operation cycle or upon manual change in blower speed (including module on/off). If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation. NOTE: If failure still exists the output shall be disabled again.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Blower does not run. (Low side driver)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Duty cycle of PWM for front blower motor < 100% and DiagResistor is low (LowSideResistor pulled to Vcc). Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Blower is on and voltage level on the ECU connector pin is permanently at low level. OR Blower is off because of control module Off and voltage level on the ECU connector pin is permanently at low level. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 1s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: none for circuit. Recirc shall default to fresh air PTC (if installed) shall default to off. Retry Strategy: None NOTE: If failure still exists the output shall be disabled again.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: If a Short to GND is present the blower is at full speed. If an Open circuit is present the blower is off.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Duty cycle of PWM for front blower motor > 0%. Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Duty cycle of PWM for front blower motor > 0% and voltage level on the ECU connector pin C3-18 is permanently at high level. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 1s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Mitigation Strategy: Default speed per VBC/controller response. Continue testing per monitoring cycle and if fault eliminated clear DTC. Retry Strategy: Retry once for each user request or ignition cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Blower does not run. (Low side driver)

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Duty cycle of PWM for front blower motor < 100% and DiagResistor is low (LowSideResistor pulled to Vcc). Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Duty cycle of PWM for front blower motor < 100% and voltage level on pin the ECU connector pin is permanently at low level DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 1s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Mitigation Strategy: Default speed per VBC/controller response. Continue testing per monitoring cycle and if fault eliminated clear DTC. Retry Strategy: none
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: If a Short to GND is present the blower is at full speed. If an Open circuit is present the blower is off.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Contol awake, no actuator drive, feedback, or Vref faults detected or logged.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set DTC(s) when door is unable to achieve target feedback voltage. A fault is detected if the door is stalled i.e. feedback value has not changed for >(2s) AND the control was not able to reach the intended feedback voltage (within +/- hysterisis). A fault will also be detected if the control moves the motor for a maximum amount of time (15sec) but is not able to achieve target feedback voltage. If error persists during calibration procedure: calibrated feedback values are not plausible, because door does not move. If a fault is detected per either of the above, the module shall retry to achieve target position every (2 seconds). After (8) consecutive failed attempts the DTC shall be logged and failsafe action(s) taken. The DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 24s ((500ms x 2 + 2s) x 8).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Mitigation Strategy: Allow normal door movement, but only allow one attempt to move past the suspected mechanical blockage after moving away from it. Retry Strategy: The feedback location where the failure occurs will not be passed for the rest of the key cycle unless the door is able to move in the opposite direction, away from the suspected mechanical blockage. In this case, there will be only 1 attempt to move past the blockage.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: No motor move possible.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Rear temp door is in the high break state. Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Can only be checked, if the motor drive lines are powered (motor driver tries to move the motor). The door does not move to its required target position. The motor driver has a Diag Pin that indicates the short condition If error persists during calibration procedure: calibrated feedback values are not plausible, because door does not move. Default values will be used until a calibration succeeds. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 16s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Mitigation Strategy: Disable circuit for the key cycle (after retry strategy). Retry Strategy: If the failure is present for 16s (2s x 8) for debouncing, disable circuit. Retry only on Ignition Cycle or change in target position. Assembly test: The number of cycles for actuator drive circuit DTC logging are reduced to 4 (@1s interval)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Motor move only possible in one direction.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Left temp door is in the low break state. Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Can only be checked, if the motor drive lines are powered (motor driver tries to move the motor). The door does not move to its required target position. The motor driver has a Diag Pin that indicates the short condition If error persists during calibration procedure: calibrated feedback values are not plausible, because door does not move. Default values will be used until a calibration succeeds. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 16s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Mitigation Strategy: Disable circuit for the key cycle (after retry strategy). Retry Strategy: If the failure is present for 16s (2s x 8) for debouncing, disable circuit. Retry only on Ignition Cycle or change in target position. Assembly test: The number of cycles for actuator drive circuit DTC logging are reduced to 4 (@1s interval)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Motor movement is only possibl in on direction.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Can only be checked, if the motor drive lines are powered (motor driver tries to move the motor). The door does not move to its required target position. The motor driver has a Diag Pin that indicates the short condition If error persists during calibration procedure: calibrated feedback values are not plausible, because door does not move. Default values will be used until a calibration succeeds. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 16s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Mitigation Strategy: Disable circuit for the key cycle (after retry strategy). Retry Strategy: If the failure is present for 16s (2s x 8) for debouncing, disable circuit. Retry only on Ignition Cycle or change in target position. Assembly test: The number of cycles for actuator drive circuit DTC logging are reduced to 4 (@1s interval)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Motor movement only possible in one direction.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: rear air distribution damper motor is in move state
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Feedback value of rear air distribution motor is not changing although motor is in move state and there exists no problem with the reference voltage for the feedback potentiometers. If error persists during calibration procedure: calibrated feedback values are not plausible, because door does not move. NOTE: This failure could be due to an open circuit or mechanical failure!
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Execute 10 repair tries with 2 seconds delay. Then shut off driver until change in target position or next ignition cycle.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: no motor move possible. If failure occurs during calibration, the calibration will be attempted with every new key cycle

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: rear air distribution damper motor is in move state
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: The low side driver chip indicates a failure to the microcontroller by setting its diagnostic pin to low level. If this happens while the door is moving, a failure is detected
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Disable circuit temorarily. Reactivate circuit and check short condition every 10 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Motor move only possible in one direction.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: rear air distribution damper motor is in move state
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: The low side driver chip indicates a failure to the microcontroller by setting its diagnostic pin to low level. If this happens while the door is moving, a failure is detected
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Disable circuit temorary. Reactivate circuit and check short condition every 10 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Motor move only possible in one direction.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: rear air distribution damper motor is in move state
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: The low side driver chip indicates a failure to the microcontroller by setting its diagnostic pin to low level. If this happens while the door is moving, a failure is detected
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Disable circuit temorary. Reactivate circuit and check short condition every 10 seconds.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Motor move only possible in one direction.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: We consider the HVAC Damper Position Sensor to be shorted to GND if the feedback A/D value is below the specified range of 0 to 40 increments. This is < ~48.8mV with a 5V Vref. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.54s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Use last valid value when a fault is detected but before failure is confirmed. Once failure confirmed, put actuator into 2-position mode moving to the endstop which is nearest target position. Defualt PTC to Off. (if equiped) Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid feedback values and if fault is eliminated, use value to position the door correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong feedback value causes unknown (wrong) position of left-hand side temp door

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present.(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: We consider the HVAC Damper Position Sensor to be shorted to BATT or Open if the feedback A/D value is above the specified range of 4052 to 4095 increments. This is > ~4.947V with a 5V Vref. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.54s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Use last valid value when a fault is detected but before failure is confirmed. Once failure confirmed, put actuator into 2-position mode moving to the endstop which is nearest target position. Defualt PTC to Off. (if equiped) Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid feedback values and if fault is eliminated, use value to position the door correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong feedback value causes unknown (wrong) position of left-hand side temp door.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: We consider the HVAC Damper Position Sensor to be shorted to GND if the feedback A/D value is below the specified range of 0 to 40 increments. This is < ~48.8mV with a 5V Vref. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.54s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Mitigation Strategy: Use last valid value when a fault is detected but before failure is confirmed. Once failure confirmed, put actuator into 2-position mode moving to end nearest target position. Disable PTC Request (if present). Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid feedback values per monitoring cycle and if fault is eliminated, use value to position the door correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong feedback value causes unknown (wrong) position of right-hand side temp door

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: We consider the HVAC Damper Position Sensor to be shorted to BATT or Open if the feedback A/D value is above the specified range of 4052 to 4095 increments. This is > ~4.947V with a 5V Vref. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.54s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Mitigation Strategy: Use last valid value when a fault is detected but before failure is confirmed. Once failure confirmed, put actuator into 2-position mode moving to end nearest target position. Disable PTC Request (if present). Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid feedback values per monitoring cycle and if fault is eliminated, use value to position the door correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong feedback value causes unknown (wrong) position of right-hand side temp door

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: We consider the Air Distribution Damper Position Sensor to be shorted to GND if the feedback A/D value is below the specified range of 0 to 40 increments. This is < ~48.8mV with a 5V Vref. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.54s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Use last valid value if fault detected but not logged, put actuator into 2-position mode. Drive to Panel for Auto, Max A/C, Panel, Panel/Floor selections and drive to Windshield for Auto(anti-fog), Windshield or Floor/Windshield. Disable Forced Recirc. Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid feedback and if fault is eliminated, use value to position the door correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong feedback value causes unknown (wrong) position of front mode door

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).

This is > ~4.947V with a 5V Vref. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.54s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Use last valid value if fault detected but not logged, Once logged, put actuator into 2-position mode. Drive to Panel for Auto, Max A/C, Panel, Panel/Floor selections and drive to Windshield for Auto(anti-fog), Windshield or Floor/Windshield. Disable Forced Recirc. Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid feedback and if fault is eliminated, use value to position the door correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong feedback value causes unknown (wrong) position of front mode door

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: We consider the Air Distribution Damper Position Sensor to be shorted to GND if the feedback A/D value is below the specified range of 0 to 40 increments. This is < ~48.8mV with a 5V Vref. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.54s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Use last valid value if fault detected but not logged. Once logged, put actuator into 2-position mode moving to Recirc for Manual recirc selection, MAX A/C or if Forced Recirc is enabled, otherwise move to outside. For priority of recirc error handling, refer to the recirc override section. Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid feedback values and if fault is eliminated, use value to position the door correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong feedback value causes unknown (wrong) position of front mode door

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: We consider the Air Distribution Damper Position Sensor to be shorted to BATT or Open if the feedback A/D value is above the specified range of 4052 to 4095 increments. This is > ~4.947V with a 5V Vref. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.54s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Use last valid value if fault detected but not logged, put actuator into 2-position mode moving to Recirc for Manual recirc selection, Max A/C or if Forced Recirc is enabled, otherwise move to outside. For priotity of recirc error handling, refer to the recirc override section. Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid feedback and if fault is eliminated, use value to position the door correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong feedback value causes unknown (wrong) position of front mode door

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Mode door is in move state. Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set DTC(s) when door is unable to achieve target feedback voltage. Condition A) Set DTC(s) when door is unable to achieve target feedback voltage. for > 1 second+ ACT_XxxxStallTimeout ( 0 seconds).For Condition A) If a stalled condition is detected per above description, and it is Between Plausible Ranges the module shall execute the following strategy: - After detecting a mechanical block the motor do a High brake with a ACT_ModeDrBrakeTimeout = 200ms timeout - The motor shall drive back from the mechanical block for ACT_StallRetryBackOffTimeout = 500ms. - Then the motor do a High brake with a ACT_ModeDrBrakeTimeout = 200ms timeout - The motor has to follow the matlab application request - These steps shall be done 8 times. The DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 20s ((500ms + 2x200ms + 2s) x 8). 200ms high brake time, 23.2s, so around 24s Condition B) A fault will also be detected if the control moves the motor for a maximum amount of time of ACT_XxxxxMaxDriveTimeout (15sec) but is not able to achieve target feedback voltage. (Where Xxxx could be Mode, Blend Door, Recir) Condtion C) If the actuator is at extreme tolerance window at CW beyond the NVM_XxxxActCwEndPtVoltYy + ACT_XxxxPosPrVoltYyZz or it as at CCW beyond the NVM_XxxxActCcwEndPtVoltYy + ACT_XxxxPosPrVoltYyZz, then Actuator command to stop the movement until new target position requested. Mechanical DTC signal shall be set
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Stop attempting to move door. Allow normal door movement, but only allow one attempt to move past the suspected mechanical blockage after moving away from it. See retry intervall when a new attempt can be started. Retry Strategy: Every new operation cycle or change in target position If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation. Redo calibration during ignition off. NOTE: If failure still exists, stop attempting to move door.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: No motor move possible.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: We consider the Front Secondary Mode Sensor to be shorted to GND if the feedback A/D value is below the specified range of 0 to 40 increments. This is < ~48.8mV with a 5V Vref. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.54s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Use last valid value if fault detected but not logged. Once logged, put actuator into 2-position mode moving to Recirc for Manual recirc selection, MAX A/C or if Forced Recirc is enabled, otherwise move to outside. For priority of recirc error handling, refer to the recirc override section. Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid feedback values and if fault is eliminated, use value to position the door correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong feedback value causes unknown (wrong) position of front secondary mode door

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Mode door is in the low break state. Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Can only be checked for each of the motor driver lines if the motor driver tries to move the motor and sets the drive line to ubatt. This depends on the drive direction (clockwise or counter clockwise). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 16s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable circuit. Retry Strategy: Every new operation cycle or on change in target position If fault is eliminated, re-enable mormal operation. NOTE: If faulure still exists the output shall be disabled again. Assembly test: The detection time shall be between 4 seconds(minimum) and 6 seconds(maximum).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Motor move only possible in one direction.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ). Front secondary mode door is in move state.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Can only be checked, if the motor drive lines are powered (motor driver tries to move the motor). The door does not move to its required target position. The motor driver has a Diag Pin that indicates the short condition. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 16s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable circuit. If one or more HS LED are active, the LEDs shall remain illuminated per normal operation. Retry strategy: Every new operation cycle or hard reset/cold boot. If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Failsafe actions: Disable circuit. If one or more HS LED are active, the LEDs shall remain illuminated per normal operation. Retry strategy: Every new operation cycle or hard reset/cold boot. If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: We consider the HVAC Damper Position Sensor to be shorted to GND if the feedback A/D value is below the specified range of 0 to 40 increments. This is < ~48.8mV with a 5V Vref. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.54s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failure: We consider the HVAC Damper Position Sensor to be shorted to GND if the feedback A/D value is below the specified range of 0 to 40 increments. This is < ~48.8mV with a 5V Vref. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.54s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong feedback value causes unknown (wrong) position of air distributiion damper door

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: We consider the Air Distribution Damper Position Sensor to be shorted to BATT or Open if the feedback A/D value is above the specified range of 4052 to 4095 increments. This is > ~4.947V with a 5V Vref. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.54s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Use last valid value if fault detected but not logged, put actuator into 2-position mode moving to Recirc for Manual recirc selection, Max A/C or if Forced Recirc is enabled, otherwise move to outside. For priotity of recirc error handling, refer to the recirc override section. Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid feedback and if fault is eliminated, use value to position the door correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong feedback value causes unknown (wrong) position of front mode door

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start )
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Rear Cabin Temperature Sensor value is below specified range (0 to 20 increments). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.6s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Mitigation Strategy: Move to default value using normal filter/slewing rules. Default strategy/value is not invoked until next Ignition cycle. Until Ignition is cycled the last valid value is used. Retry Strategy: Continuously check for valid values.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong temperature value measured, wrong configuration of incar temperature.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, NO Vref fault present (Use last valid value if Vref fault detected - Use default value if Vref fault logged). Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start )
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Rear Cabin Temperature Sensor value is above specified range (1003 to 1023 increments). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.6s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Mitigation Strategy: Move to default value using normal filter/slewing rules. Default strategy/value is not invoked until next Ignition cycle. Until Ignition is cycled the last valid value is used. Retry Strategy: Continuously check for valid values.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Pull up resistor causes the analog input to rise to VCC

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start )
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Left Rear Panel Air Discharge Temperature Sensor's value is less or equal to 40 ADC counts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Until the next ignition cycle: Use last valid value. After ignition cycle (and failure is still present) Use default discharge temperature value(10°C) by using current filter/slewing rates
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong sensor values measured.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start )
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Left Rear Panel Air Discharge Temperature Sensor's value is equal or greater than 4052 ADC counts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Until the next ignition cycle: Use last valid value. After ignition cycle (and failure is still present) Use default discharge temperature value(10°C) by using current filter/slewing rates
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong sensor values measured.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start )
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Left Rear Floor Air Discharge Temperature Sensor's value is less or equal to 40 ADC counts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Until the next ignition cycle: Use last valid value. After ignition cycle (and failure is still present) Use default discharge temperature value(10°C) by using current filter/slewing rates
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong sensor values measured.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start )
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Left Rear Floor Air Discharge Temperature Sensor's value is equal or greater than 4052 ADC counts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Until the next ignition cycle: Use last valid value. After ignition cycle (and failure is still present) Use default discharge temperature value(10°C) by using current filter/slewing rates
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong sensor values measured.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: HVAC Passenger Mode Door Actuator Motor

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ). Front secondary mode door is in move state.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set DTC(s) when door is unable to achieve target feedback voltage. Condition A) Set DTC(s) when door is unable to achieve target feedback voltage. for > 1 second+ ACT_XxxxStallTimeout ( 0 seconds).For Condition A) If a stalled condition is detected per above description, and it is Between Plausible Ranges the module shall execute the following strategy: - After detecting a mechanical block the motor do a High brake with a ACT_ModeDrBrakeTimeout = 200ms timeout - The motor shall drive back from the mechanical block for ACT_StallRetryBackOffTimeout = 500ms. - Then the motor do a High brake with a ACT_ModeDrBrakeTimeout = 200ms timeout - The motor has to follow the matlab application request - These steps shall be done 8 times. The DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 20s ((500ms + 2x200ms + 2s) x 8). 200ms high brake time, 23.2s, so around 24s Condition B) A fault will also be detected if the control moves the motor for a maximum amount of time of ACT_XxxxxMaxDriveTimeout (15sec) but is not able to achieve target feedback voltage. (Where Xxxx could be Mode, Blend Door, Recir) Condtion C) If the actuator is at extreme tolerance window at CW beyond the NVM_XxxxActCwEndPtVoltYy + ACT_XxxxPosPrVoltYyZz or it as at CCW beyond the NVM_XxxxActCcwEndPtVoltYy + ACT_XxxxPosPrVoltYyZz, then Actuator command to stop the movement until new target position requested. Mechanical DTC signal shall be set
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Stop attempting to move door. Allow normal door movement, but only allow one attempt to move past the suspected mechanical blockage after moving away from it. See retry intervall when a new attempt can be started. Retry Strategy: Every new operation cycle or change in target position If fault is eliminated, re-enable normal operation. Redo calibration during ignition off. NOTE: If failure still exists, stop attempting to move door.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: No motor move possible.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ). Front secondary mode door is in move state.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Can only be checked for each of the motor drive lines if the motor driver tries to move the motor and sets the drive line to ubatt, whether line was attempted to be driven low. This depends on the drive direction (clockwise or counter clockwise).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable circuit. Retry Strategy: Every new operation cycle or on change in target position If fault is eliminated, re-enable mormal operation. NOTE: If faulure still exists the output shall be disabled again. Assembly test: The detection time shall be between 4 seconds(minimum) and 6 seconds(maximum).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Motor move only possible in one direction.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ). Front secondary mode door is in move state.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Can only be checked for each of the motor drive lines if the motor driver tries to move the motor and sets the drive line to GND, whether line was attempted to be driven high. This depends on the drive direction (clockwise or counter clockwise).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable circuit. Retry Strategy: Every new operation cycle or on change in target position If fault is eliminated, re-enable mormal operation. NOTE: If faulure still exists the output shall be disabled again. Assembly test: The detection time shall be between 4 seconds(minimum) and 6 seconds(maximum).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Motor move only possible in one direction.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ). Front secondary mode door is in move state.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Can only be checked, if the motor drive lines are powered (motor driver tries to move the motor). The door does not move to its required target position.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Disable circuit. Retry Strategy: Every new operation cycle or on change in target position If fault is eliminated, re-enable mormal operation. NOTE: If faulure still exists the output shall be disabled again. Assembly test: The detection time shall be between 4 seconds(minimum) and 6 seconds(maximum).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: No motor move possible.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: HVAC Passenger Mode Door Actuator Position Sensor

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: We consider the Sensor to be shorted to GND if the feedback A/D value is below the specified range of 0 to 40 increments. This is < ~48.8mV with a 5V Vref. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.54s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Use last valid value when a fault is detected but before failure is confirmed. Once failure confirmed, put actuator into 2-position mode moving to the endstop which is nearest target position. Defualt PTC to Off. (if equiped) Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid feedback values and if fault is eliminated, use value to position the door correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong feedback value causes unknown (wrong) position of HVAC Passenger Mode Door

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: We consider the Sensor to be shorted to BATT or Open if the feedback A/D value is above the specified range of 4052 to 4095 increments. This is > ~4.947V with a 5V Vref. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.54s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Use last valid value when a fault is detected but before failure is confirmed. Once failure confirmed, put actuator into 2-position mode moving to the endstop which is nearest target position. Defualt PTC to Off. (if equiped) Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid feedback values and if fault is eliminated, use value to position the door correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong feedback value causes unknown (wrong) position of HVAC Passenger Mode Door

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Cabine Temperature Sensor value is below specified range (0 to 40 increments). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more then 2.6s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Until new operation cycle: Use the last valid value. After new operation cycle (and error is still present), move to default value(24°C) using normal filter/slewing rules. Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid sensor values and if fault is eliminated, use sensor value.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong temperature value measured, wrong configuration of incar temperature.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Cabin Temperature Sensor value is above specified range (4052 to 4095 increments). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more then 2.6s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Until new operation cycle: Use the last valid value. After new operation cycle (and error is still present), move to default value(24°C) using normal filter/slewing rules. Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid sensor values and if fault is eliminated, use sensor value.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Pull up resistor causes the analog input to rise to VCC.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected - Use default value if Vref fault logged) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Right Solar Sensor value is below specified range (0 to 40 increments) DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.6s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Until ignition cycle: Use the last valid value. After new ignition cycle (and error is still present), Move to default value (0 W/m² - full dark) using normal filter/slewing rules. Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid sensor values and if fault is eliminated, use sensor value.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong sunload value measured, sunload has no influence on climate control.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected - Use default value if Vref fault logged) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Right Solar Sensor value is above specified range (4052 to 4095 increments). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.6s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Until ignition cycle: Use the last valid value. After new ignition cycle (and error is still present), Move to default value (0 W/m² - full dark) using normal filter/slewing rules. Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid sensor values and if fault is eliminated, use sensor value.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong sunload value measured, sunload has no influence on climate control.
