(vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Left Solar Sensor value is below specified range(0 to 40 increments). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.6s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Until ignition cycle: Use the last valid value. After new ignition cycle (and error is still present), Move to default value (0 W/m² - full dark) using normal filter/slewing rules. Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid sensor values and if fault is eliminated, use sensor value.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong sunload value measured, sunload has no influence on climate control

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected - Use default value if Vref fault logged) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Left Solar Sensor value above specified range (4052 to 4095 increments). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.6s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Until ignition cycle: Use the last valid value. After new ignition cycle (and error is still present), Move to default value (0 W/m² - full dark) using normal filter/slewing rules. Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid sensor values and if fault is eliminated, use sensor value.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong sunload value measured, sunload has no influence on climate control.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected - Use default value if Vref fault logged) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run, Autostopped, No LV Bus and Remote Start).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Sensor input is constantly set to GND. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.6s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Until new operation cycle: Use the last valid value. After new operation cycle (and failure is still active), Default value = 0%RH Move to default value using normal filter/slewing rules. NOTE: An error in the humidity sensor will cause fog probability to be 0% Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid sensor values and if fault is eliminated, use sensor value.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong humidity value measured, humidity has no influence on climate control.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected - Use default value if Vref fault logged) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Sensor input is constantly set to Ubatt or Open. DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.6s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Until new operation cycle: Use the last valid value. After new operation cycle (and failure is still active), Default value = 0%RH Move to default value using normal filter/slewing rules. NOTE: An error in the humidity sensor will cause fog probability to be 0% Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid sensor values and if fault is eliminated, use sensor value.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong humidity value measured, humidity has no influence on climate control.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present (Use last valid value if Vref fault detected but failure unconfirmed. Follow failsafe action(s) once Vref failure confirmed). Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run , Autostopped , No LV Bus and Remote Start ). The Humidity Sensor has to be ON for at least 1min before testing for failure.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Measured frequency is out of range: Sensor frequency is below: 38Hz (absolute minimum, the nominal 100% value is 38 Hz) or Sensor frequency is above 92Hz (absolute maximum, the nominal 0% value is 92Hz)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe action(s): Until new operation cycle: Use the last valid value. After new operation cycle (and failure is still active) Default value = 0%RH Move to default value using normal filter/slewing rules. Note: An error in the humidity sensor will cause fog probability to be 0%. Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid sensor values and if fualt is eliminated, use sensor value.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong humidity sensor value measured

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected - Use default value if Vref fault logged) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run, Autostopped, No LV Bus and Remote Start).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Evap Temperature Sensor value is below specified range (0 to 40 increments). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.6s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Depending on the recirculation position: If in FULL_RECIRC position: use the incar temperature, else use the ambient temperature. Send signal HvacEvap_Te_Actl with 0x3FF(Fault). Disable automatic recirc strategies. Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid sensor values and if fault is eliminated, use sensor value.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong temperature value measured, air mixture ratio cannot be calculated correctly.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected - Use default value if Vref fault logged) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run, Autostopped, No LV Bus and Remote Start).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Evap Temperature Sensor value is above specified range (4052 to 4095 increments). DTC will log if failure condition is present for more than 2.6s
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Depending on the recirculation position: If in FULL_RECIRC position: use the incar temperature, else use the ambient temperature. Send signal HvacEvap_Te_Actl with 0x3FF(Fault). Disable automatic recirc strategies. Retry Strategy: Monitor for valid sensor values and if fault is eliminated, use sensor value.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong temperature value measured, air mixture ratio cannot be calculated correctly.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected - Use default value if Vref fault logged) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run, Autostopped, No LV Bus and Remote Start).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: We consider the Sensor to be shorted to GND if the feedback A/D value is less or equal to 40 ADC counts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Once failure detected put actuator into 2-position mode. Monitor for valid feedback values and if fault is eliminated, use value to position the door correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong feedback value causes unknown (wrong) position of rear air distribution actuator

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Control awake, no Vref fault present(Use last valid value if Vref fault detected - Use default value if Vref fault logged) Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run, Autostopped, No LV Bus and Remote Start).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Failure: We consider the Sensor to be shorted to BATT or Open if the feedback A/D value is equal or greater than 4052 ADC counts.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Once failure detected put actuator into 2-position mode. Monitor for valid feedback values and if fault is eliminated, use value to position the door correctly.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong feedback value causes unknown (wrong) position of rear air distribution actuator

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Normal Run)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when any of the following messages are missing for more than 5 consecutive seconds: 0x178 - EngineClimateData_MS1
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: For CAN Message faults, unless specified otherwise use last valid values until DTC is logged and failsafe actions taken. Retry Strategy: Return back to normal operation upon reception of the previously missing message.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Wrong values for OAT Calculation are used.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Body Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Normal Run)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when any of the following messages are missing for more than 5 consecutive sec. after they should have been received: 0x3B3, 0x42A, 0x42C, 0x3C4, 0x40A
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: If message 3B3 is missing: - Set contorl module to vehicle state = Off - Set illumination to full nighttime brightness (intensity_1 - backlit_status = night12, litval 4/5) If message 42A and 42C is missing: - Disable LCAP strategy If message 3C4 is missing: - Use engine coolant temperature error handling Retry Strategy: Depending on the missing message - Return back to normal operation upon reception of the previously missing message.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: 3B3 - always full nighttime illumination

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Restraints Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Normal Run)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when any of the following messages is missing for more than 5 consecutive sec. after it should have been received: 0x42E
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: For CAN Message faults, unless specified otherwise use last valid values until DTC is logged and failsafe actions taken. 0x42E - RstrnImpactEvntStatus: See IAF messgae handling, See vehicle speed error handling, see engine speed error handling. Retry Strategy: Return back to normal operation upon reception of the previously missing message.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: PADI / PAEI are always OFF.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Instrument Panel Cluster (IPC) Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Normal Run)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when any of the following messages are missing for more than 5 consecutive sec. after they should have been received: 0x3E0
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: For CAN Message faults, unless specified otherwise use last valid values until DTC is logged and failsafe actions taken. 3E0- Use Vehicle defaults for all users Retry Strategy: Return back to normal operation upon reception of the previously missing message.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Personality settings are not what is expected by user.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With HVAC Control Module - Rear

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Normal Run)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when any of the following signals in message 0x35A are missing for more than 5 consecutive sec. after they should have been received: -Rear_Climate_Data
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Use last valid values until DTC is logged and failsafe actions taken(Per Front Climate Module to Rear Aux Interface Overview req'ts).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Front climate module will resume accepting all inputs from the rear climate module upon receipt of a valid message.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Auxiliary Heater Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Normal Run)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when any of the following signals in message 0x344 are missing for more than 5 consecutive sec. after they should have been received: -Climate_Fuel_Req
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: None.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Use corresponding signal values from CAN bus if Message received again.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Lost Communication With Accessory Protocol Interface Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Normal Run)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set when any of the following messages are missing for more than 5 consecutive sec. after they should have been received: 0x358, 0x3E2
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: For CAN Message faults, unless specified otherwise use last valid values until DTC is logged and failsafe actions taken. For CAN message faults, default signal states shall only be used if applicable message is faulted. All valid signal states for all properly received messages shall be used normally. 0x358 - No default strategy values needed 0x3E2 - Use vehicle defaults for all users Retry Strategy: None
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Touch screen (SYNC) input does not reflect climate control output. Voice blower limiting not functioning. Personality settings may not be as expected.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received from ECM/PCM A

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Normal Run)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set if the Quality Factor for any of the following signals are set to 'Faulty' for more than 5 consecutive seconds 0x3C4 - EngClnt_Te_Actl 0x178 - AirAmb_Te_Actl 0x42E - Veh_V_ActlEng
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: For CAN Message faults, unless specified otherwise use last valid values until DTC is logged and failsafe actions taken. for EngClnt_Te_Actl see engine coolant error handling (default value = 93.3°C) for AirAmb_Te_Actl see air ambient temperature calculation (default value = 10°C) for Veh_V_ActlEng see vehicle speed error handling (default value = 88.5 kph) Retry Strategy: None
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: EngClnt_Te_Actl = CELO may be invoked without a cold engine AirAmb_Te_Actl = OAT display may be inaccurate (50degF), AUTO climate function will not follow actual external ambient changes Veh_V_ActlEng = OAT will not update

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Normal Run)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set if the Update Bit for any any of the following signals are set to 'Unchanged_data' for more than 5 consecutive seconds 0x3C4 - EngClnt_Te_Actl MetricActv_B_Actl MetricActvTe_B_Actl 0x42E - Veh_V_ActlEng EngAout_N_Actl 0x3BC - PwSrcULo_Pc_Mx PwSrcULoFalt_D_Stat ApedPos_Pc_ActlArb 0x42A - BattUlo_U_Actl PwSrcUlo_I_Actl PwSrcUlo_I_Mx 0x42C - AirCondRec_B_Rq Shed_Feature_Group_ID Shed_Level_Req Batt_Crit_SoC_B Batt_Lo_SoC_B
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: For CAN Message faults, unless specified otherwise use last valid values until DTC is logged and failsafe actions taken. for EngClnt_Te_Actl = 93.3°C UB = 1, Qf = OK for Veh_V_ActlEng = 88.5 kph EngAout_N_Actl= 1500 rpm Retry Strategy: None
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: EngClnt_Te_Actl = CELO may be invoked without a cold engine Veh_V_ActlEng = OAT will not update

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Body Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Normal Run).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set if "invalid" data state received for more than 5 consecutive seconds for any of the following signals (if they are used by the climate module) Ignition_Status - Set If signal is not: 0x00-Unknow, 0x01-Off, 0x02-Accessory, 0x04-Run, 0x08-Start Parklamp_Status - Set if signal is 0x03 LitVal - Set if signal is not: 0x00-Night, 0x01-Twilight_1, 0x02-Twilight_2, 0x03-Twilight_3, 0x04-Twilight_4, 0x05-Day, 0xFE-Unknown Dimming_Lvl - Set if signal is above 0x12 - Day_6, Exeption: 0xFE-Unknown BattUlo_U_Actl - Set if signal is 0xFF PwrSrcUlo_I_Actl - Set if signal is 0xFF PwrSrcUlo_I_Mx - Set if signal is 0xFF
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: For CAN Message faults, unless specified otherwise use last valid values until DTC is logged and failsafe actions taken. for Ignition_Status - module must behave as in vehicle state Off for LitVal, Dimming_Lvl - set to highest nighttime brightness (night_12 and litval 4/5) for BattUlo_U_Actl, PwrSrcUlo_I_Actl, PwrSrcUlo_I_Mx - disengage automatic activated loads as described inside LCAP chapter. Retry Strategy: None
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Ignition_Status - module off - all illumination signals = always full nighttime illumination Car_Mode = no symptom

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Normal Run)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set if "unknown" data state received for more than 5 consecutive seconds for any of the following signals (if they are used by the climate module) Ignition_Status - value 0x00 ParkLamp_Status - value 0x02 LitVal - value 0xFE Dimming_Lvl - value 0xFE Remote_Start_Status - 0x02
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: For CAN Message faults, unless specified otherwise use last valid values until DTC is logged and failsafe actions taken. for Ignition_Status - module must behave as in vehicle state Off for LitVal / Dimming_Lvl - set to maximum nighttime brightness (equal to Litval = 5 and Dimming_Lvl = 12) Retry Strategy: None
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Ignition_Status - module off - all illumination signals = always full nighttime illumination Car_Mode = no symptom

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From Restraints Control Module

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Normal Run).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set if the Update Bit for any of the following signals are set to 'Unchanged_data' for more than 5 consecutive seconds 0x42E: RstrnlmpactEvntStatus 0x42E: PassRstInd_Req
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: For RstrnlmpactEvntStatus fault, see IAF handling for details For PassRstrnInd_Req fault, use the default value:0x03 AirbagOnNotIllum_AirbagOffNotIllum
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: PADI / PAEI stay inactive.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Invalid Data Received From HVAC Control Module- Rear

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle state must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Normal Run).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Set if "invalid" data state received for more than 5 consecutive seconds for any signals within message 0x35A that are used by Climate Module.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Mitigation Strategy: For CAN Message faults, unless specified otherwise use last valid values until DTC is logged and failsafe actions taken. The front module shall continue to operate in the current state, use the last valid values for signals within this message, and respond normally to user inputs for rear aux control.

DTC.DESCRIPTION: Solid State Driver Protection Active -Driver Disabled

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle State must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run, Autostopped, No LV Bus and Remote Start)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: DTC shall be set whenever any output FET has reached the end of the 1/3, 2/3 or 3/3 maximum FET counter value together with the circuit specific DTC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Affected circuit shall be disabled. Retry Strategy: None DTC gets automatically removed when all retry flags of the FET protected circuits are set to "RETRY". This DTC can not age.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Affected circuits disabled.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: This DTC shall be logged by default and will be cleared only after the module is successfully configured with Method 3 download.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: DTC shall be set by supplier and cleared by Ford EOL with a successful Method 3 download.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe acitions: None Retry Strategy: None
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Method 3 content will not function

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: This DTC shall be logged by default and will be cleared only after the module is successfully configured at which point it CANNOT be logged again (since initial configuration was completed successfully.)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Initial configuration not done (DID 0xDE00 and 0xDE01 are not yet written). This DTC shall be logged by default and will be cleared only after the module is successfully configured at which point it CANNOT be logged again(since initial configuration was completed successfully).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Inhibit DTC logging for fault associated with configurable circuit/functions including missing & invalid message faults. Retry Strategy: None
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: configurable content will not function

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle State must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run, Autostopped, No LV Bus and Remote Start)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: Checksum failure in Flash ROM and EEPROM.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: None Retry Strategy: None
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Various fault symptoms depending on memory area corrupted.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: Vehicle State must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run, Autostopped, No LV Bus and Remote Start)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: DTC shall be set whenever any output FET has reached 3/3 lifetime together with the circuit specific DTC and the Solid State Driver DTC.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: Affected circuit shall be permanently disabled. Retry Strategy: None It is not allowed to clear this DTC, even not with Ford diagnositcs tools.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: Affected circuit is permanently disabled.

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: DTC can be logged outside of normal DTC logging voltage range.Vehicle State must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run, Autostopped, No LV Bus and Remote Start)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The supply voltage level is below threshold of 8V for more than 10 seconds. NOTE: This DTC can be logged outside the normal DTC operation range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: see voltage operation handing(Battery Management) Retry Strategy: Continue monitoring, see voltage operation handling for reactivation strategies(Battery Management).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: restricted functionality of ECU

DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.TEST_RUN_CRITERIA: DTC can be logged outside of normal DTC logging voltage range.Vehicle State must be in the allowed states for more than 5 seconds. (vehicle states allowed states: Factory, Normal Run, Autostopped, No LV Bus and Remote Start)
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FDC_PASS_FAIL_CRITERIA: The supply voltage level is above threshold of 16V for more than 2.5 seconds. NOTE: This DTC can be logged outside the normal DTC operation range.
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.ECU_FAULT_ACTION: Failsafe actions: See voltage operation handling(Battery Management). Enter operational mode defined in HVI / LVI Spec, and continue testing per monitoring cycle. Retry Strategy: Continue monitoring, see voltage operaiton handling for reactivation strategies (Battery Management).
DTC_CONTINUOUS_PARAMETERS.FAULT_SYMPTOM: restricted functionality of ECU.

ENUM_MEMBER.DESCRIPTION: Valid Application Software is NOT Present

ROUTINE.NAME: Obtain Solid State Driver Life Counter

SUB_FIELD.NAME: Solid State Driver Short Circuit Counts
